title: Nami’s New Tattoo
description: On pages 5–8, nami’s new tattoo focuses on Nami, Luffy, Zoro, Usopp as the village celebrates after Arlong’s defeat while Nami prepares to leave her home behind.
scene: On pages 5–8, nami’s new tattoo focuses on Nami, Luffy, Zoro, Usopp as the village celebrates after Arlong’s defeat while Nami prepares to leave her home behind.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well he or she has my deepest C... Hm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hey, kid. Nami said she'll join your crew and become a pirate... it'll be a dangerous journey.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...so if you ever do something to steal her smile away, I'll personally come and kill you!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I thought you'd be all, "Oh why did my dad have to die before this day," or something like that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's what I thought at first too.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That nothing good would come from such thoughts.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Here I was, waiting for a chance to pick on you some more...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You've already picked on me enough!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm afraid erasing it completely will be impossible,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Since it'll leave a bit of a scar.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Tattoos aren't something you can just erase...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't want anyone else to see this tattoo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm not even one of them... but thanks to this, I've been branded as one...!

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: Nojiko! What happened!? You have a tattoo!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's only a tattoo. It's just another decoration.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm the same as you now, Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's something I'd like you to tattoo for me...

summary: This part releases the tension of Arlong Park through celebration, goodbye, and Nami’s choice to sail with the crew.
